'''wasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rmhher|rmhher]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rmhher|rmhher]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsæthæth|wæsæthæth]] || [[word:wæsæthæj|wæsæthæj]] || [[word:wæsæthæsh|wæsæthæsh]] || [[word:wæsæthæ|wæsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasasathath|wasasathath]] || [[word:wasasathaj|wasasathaj]] || [[word:wasasathash|wasasathash]] || [[word:wasasatha|wasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasathath|wasathath]] || [[word:wasathaj|wasathaj]] || [[word:wasathash|wasathash]] || [[word:wasatha|wasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasafthath|wasafthath]] || [[word:wasafthaj|wasafthaj]] || [[word:wasafthash|wasafthash]] || [[word:wasafthaf|wasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasathatha|wasathatha]] || [[word:wasathaja|wasathaja]] || [[word:wasathasha|wasathasha]] || [[word:wasathaka|wasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasathath|wasathath]] || [[word:wasathaj|wasathaj]] || [[word:wasathash|wasathash]] || [[word:wasatha|wasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasathathal|wasathathal]] || [[word:wasathajal|wasathajal]] || [[word:wasathashal|wasathashal]] || [[word:wasathakal|wasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasathathatha|wasathathatha]] || [[word:wasathajaja|wasathajaja]] || [[word:wasathashasha|wasathashasha]] || [[word:wasathaka|wasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasathathan|wasathathan]] || [[word:wasathajan|wasathajan]] || [[word:wasathashan|wasathashan]] || [[word:wasathakan|wasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasathathaoro|wasathathaoro]] || [[word:wasathajaoro|wasathajaoro]] || [[word:wasathashaoro|wasathashaoro]] || [[word:wasathakaoro|wasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
